overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through a rural landscape. The clip begins at night near a village with thatched-roof huts, transitions through open grasslands and forest paths in darkness, then abruptly shifts to bright daylight as the journey continues through sunlit fields.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village outskirts with thatched huts

events.description: departing from stone ruins area into village path
passing warm torchlight from wooden hut windows

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding a horse at a steady canter through a dark village, passing traditional wooden huts with warm interior lighting

entered.detail: ancient stone structure with archway partially covered in moss
traditional wooden cottage with straw roof emitting warm light from windows
burning torch mounted on a wooden post illuminating the path
rustic wooden fence lining the village path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt on horseback departing from stone ruins at night. He rides along a dirt path past traditional thatched-roof huts with warm torchlight glowing from windows. The environment is dark with limited visibility beyond the immediate path, creating an atmospheric medieval village setting.

events.description: horse slows to a trot as path becomes more winding
entering denser tree line with birch trees flanking the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along a winding dirt path through open grasslands and sparse forest, navigating gentle turns in the darkness

entered.detail: tall white-barked trees lining the left side of the path
dark treeline visible in the distance against the night sky
open fields of tall grass extending into the darkness

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village behind, the scene opens into wide grasslands under a dark cloudy night sky. The path winds through tall grass and scattered trees, with birch trees appearing on the left side. The environment is isolated and atmospheric, with the horse navigating gentle curves along the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit prairie trail with distant mountains

events.description: abrupt transition from night to bright daylight with sun appearing over the horizon
approaching wooden fence line and rustic cabin on the right

agents.ego_description: riding through sunlit grasslands as the path ascends a gentle hill, with the sun now visible and casting long shadows

entered.detail: sun visible in the sky casting warm light across the landscape
small rustic log cabin with wooden roof
snow-capped mountain range visible on the horizon
weathered wooden fence running parallel to the path

segments.scene_description: The scene abruptly shifts from night to bright daylight, revealing a sunlit prairie with the sun shining overhead. The same path continues through golden grasslands, now revealing distant mountains on the horizon. A wooden cabin and fence line appear on the right as the horse continues along the trail in the warm morning light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey on horseback that transforms from a dark, atmospheric medieval village into a bright, sunlit prairie. It begins with Geralt departing from stone ruins at night, riding along a dirt path past thatched-roof huts illuminated by the warm glow of torchlight. As the village recedes, the scene opens into wide, isolated grasslands under a cloudy night sky, where the path winds through tall grass and scattered birch trees. The environment then abruptly shifts from darkness to brilliant daylight, revealing a golden prairie with the sun shining overhead and distant mountains appearing on the horizon. The journey finally continues past a wooden cabin and fence line as the horse navigates the trail in the warm morning light.
